error.error_description: Token has been expired or revoked.
error.cause: Likely: GCP project is in 'testing' publishing status (refresh tokens expire every 7 days). OR: token was manually revoked. Last re-auth was ~Jun 7 (8 days ago).

impact.gsc_data_freshness: STALE — cannot pull fresh Search Analytics, URL Inspection, or sitemap data
impact.first_click_detection: BLIND — no way to detect first clicks without manual GSC UI check
impact.ranking_monitoring: BLIND — last data from Jun 4-10 window

recovery_steps_for_qasem: 2. Open the URL in Windows browser (Chrome with QFINHUB Google account logged in)
3. Google shows an authorization code — copy it
5. Script exchanges code for tokens, saves to ~/.hermes/google-indexing-token.json
7. If GCP project is in testing mode → go to GCP Console → OAuth consent screen → Publish App
8. After publishing, re-auth one more time for indefinite-lifetime refresh token
